query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `product_links` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `product_links_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `product_links` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `product_links_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
